purpose: Prove IAMScope does not overclaim validated admin reachability when IAM permission/trust allow AssumeRole but an effective SCP denies sts:AssumeRole in the member account.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect live Organizations SCP evidence for a dedicated member account.
IAMScope can bind an SCP deny on sts:AssumeRole to the relevant AssumeRole trust edge.
IAMScope does not emit a validated admin reachability claim for the Env12 alice->admin path.
benchmark_proves: For Env12, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge from alice to admin.
For Env12, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole trust edge from alice to admin.
Scenario.json contains at least one target-scoped SCP constraint denying sts:AssumeRole.
The Env12 target trust edge is bound to an SCP constraint.
For the same source and target, IAMScope emits zero validated admin_reachability findings.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove NotAction SCP handling live.
It does not prove resource-scoped SCP handling live.
It does not prove root or OU inherited SCP behavior beyond the selected direct member-account attachment.
It does not prove broad Organizations safety outside the dedicated test account.
unknowns_remaining: Whether other SCP condition and exception forms produce the intended truth states remains outside this case.
Whether multi-account cross-account AssumeRole paths interact with SCPs the same way remains outside this case.

environment.notes: Existing management account and existing dedicated member account. Terraform creates only member IAM fixture; run.sh creates one Env12-specific SCP and attaches it directly to the member account.

ground_truth.reason: Alice has IAM permission and trust to assume env12-admin, and env12-admin is admin-equivalent, but the attached Env12 SCP denies sts:AssumeRole on the env12-admin role ARN.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env12 alice->admin permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env12 alice->admin trust edge exists structurally.
A live Organizations SCP denying sts:AssumeRole on env12-admin is present in scenario.json.
The Env12 trust edge is bound to an SCP constraint.
The exact Env12 alice->admin path is not falsely emitted as validated admin reachability.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope can avoid shortcutting IAM-allowed paths into validated admin reachability when a target-scoped SCP blocks sts:AssumeRole.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader SCP family correctness remains only implied.
